---
title: "SIPP EDA"
author: "Sarah Krause"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Read in the SIPP data

```{r}
#Load the "data.table", "dplyer", and "bit64" libraries
install.packages("data.table")
library(data.table)
install.packages("bit64")
library(bit64)
install.packages("dplyr")
library(dplyr)
install.packages("haven")
library(haven)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# Step 1: Read all named columns plus pattern-matched ones
all_cols <- names(fread(ds, sep = "|", nrows = 0))

# Step 2: Define exact variables
exact_vars <- c(
  # ID variables
  'SSUID', 'PNUM', 'MONTHCODE', 'ERESIDENCEID', 'ERELRPE', 'SPANEL', 'SWAVE',
  'SHHADID', 'THHLDSTATUS', 'RIN_UNIV',

  # Base weight
  'WPFINWGT',

  # State of residence
  'TEHC_ST', 'TST_INTV',

  # Income
  'TPTOTINC', 'TFTOTINC', 'THNETWORTH', 'TPEARN',
  'TUNEMP_AMT', 'TSSI_AMT', 'TSSRX', 'TSSXAMT',
  'TTANF_AMT', 'TVET_AMT', 'TWIC_AMT', 'TCSPP_AMT', 'TCSPR_AMT',

  # Deductions
  'TCHCARE_AMT', 'TMOOP',

  # Household composition & filing unit
  'TLIVQTR', 'ETENURE', 'EMS', 'EMS_EHC', 'EENROLL', 'ESCHOOL',

  # Demographics
  'ESEX', 'TAGE', 'TAGE_EHC', 'ERACE', 'EORIGIN', 'EEDUC',

  # Citizenship & immigration
  'ENATIVITY', 'ECITIZEN', 'EIMM_STAT', 'TYEAR_ENTRY',

  # Categorical eligibility & disability
  'ESSIV', 'ETANF', 'RDIS', 'RDIS_ALT', 'EWIC',

  # Assets
  'ERET_LUMPSUM', 'TDRAW_AMT'
)

# Step 3: Define patterns for prefix/suffix matched variables
patterns <- c(
  "^SNAP", "^TEHC", "^TCHCARE", "^TMED", "^EDIS", "^EMED",
  "^EOWN", "^EJSOWN", "^EJOOWN", "^EOOWN",
  "^TJS", "^TJO", "^VAL", "^TO",
  "^EVEH", "^TVEH"
)

pattern_vars <- unique(unlist(lapply(patterns, function(p) grep(p, all_cols, value = TRUE))))

# Step 4: Combine, keep only cols that exist, and read
keep_vars <- unique(c(exact_vars, pattern_vars))
keep_vars <- keep_vars[keep_vars %in% all_cols]

pu <- fread(ds, sep = "|", select = keep_vars)
```

```{r}
# Make sure all the column names are upper-case 
names(pu) <- toupper(names(pu))

# Preview the data 
head(pu, 20)

```

# EDA

```{r}
# Flag person-months that are in-universe (RIN_UNIV == 1)
pu_active <- pu[RIN_UNIV == 1]
nrow(pu_active)

cat("Unique individuals:", pu_active[, uniqueN(paste(SSUID, PNUM))], "\n")
cat("Unique households:", pu_active[, uniqueN(SSUID)], "\n")
cat("Months observed:", sort(unique(pu_active$MONTHCODE)), "\n\n")
```

```{r}
# missingness
tibble(variable = names(pu_active),
       pct_missing = colMeans(is.na(pu_active)) * 100) |>
  arrange(desc(pct_missing))
```

# Distribution of personal and family income

```{r}
 
pu_active[, .(
  N        = .N,
  N_zero   = sum(TPTOTINC == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
  N_neg    = sum(TPTOTINC < 0,  na.rm = TRUE),
  mean     = round(weighted.mean(TPTOTINC, WPFINWGT, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  median   = round(median(TPTOTINC, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  p25      = round(quantile(TPTOTINC, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  p75      = round(quantile(TPTOTINC, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  p95      = round(quantile(TPTOTINC, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  max      = max(TPTOTINC, na.rm = TRUE)
)]

pu_active[, .(
  N        = .N,
  N_zero   = sum(TFTOTINC == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
  N_neg    = sum(TFTOTINC < 0,  na.rm = TRUE),
  mean     = round(weighted.mean(TFTOTINC, WPFINWGT, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  median   = round(median(TFTOTINC, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  p25      = round(quantile(TFTOTINC, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  p75      = round(quantile(TFTOTINC, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  p95      = round(quantile(TFTOTINC, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
  max      = max(TFTOTINC, na.rm = TRUE)
)]
 
p95_fam <- quantile(pu_active$TFTOTINC, 0.95, na.rm = TRUE)
 
ggplot(pu_active[TFTOTINC >= 0 & TFTOTINC <= p95_fam],
       aes(x = TFTOTINC, weight = WPFINWGT)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 60, fill = "#2c7bb6", color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::dollar_format(prefix = "$")) +
  labs(
    title    = "Distribution of Monthly Family Income (TFTOTINC)",
    subtitle = "Weighted; capped at 95th percentile; in-universe person-months",
    x        = "Monthly Family Income ($)",
    y        = "Weighted Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Income by state

```{r}
state_income <- pu_active[, .(
  mean_fam_income   = round(weighted.mean(TFTOTINC, WPFINWGT, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
  median_fam_income = round(median(TFTOTINC, na.rm = TRUE), 0),
  pct_zero_income   = round(100 * weighted.mean(TFTOTINC == 0, WPFINWGT, na.rm = TRUE), 1)
), by = TEHC_ST][order(TEHC_ST)]
state_income
 
```

# Earned vs. Unearned Income

```{r}
pu_active[, income_type := fcase(
  TPEARN > 0 & (TPTOTINC - TPEARN) <= 0, "Earned only",
  TPEARN <= 0 & (TPTOTINC - TPEARN) > 0, "Unearned only",
  TPEARN > 0 & (TPTOTINC - TPEARN) > 0,  "Both",
  default = "No income"
)]
 
income_type_summary <- pu_active[, .(
  weighted_n = sum(WPFINWGT),
  pct        = round(100 * sum(WPFINWGT) / sum(pu_active$WPFINWGT), 1)
), by = income_type][order(-pct)]
income_type_summary
 
ggplot(income_type_summary, aes(x = reorder(income_type, pct), y = pct)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#756bb1") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title    = "Income Composition of Person-Months",
    subtitle = "Weighted; in-universe person-months",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "% of Person-Months"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
 
```

# SNAP Policy Database

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(here)

spd <- read_excel(here("data", "SNAPPolicyDatabase.xlsx"),
                  sheet = "SNAP Policy Database")


```

Select september 2019

```{r}
sept_2010 <- spd |>
  filter(yearmonth == 201909)
```
